items.title: Vitest
items.description: Vite-native test runner. My default for unit testing in frontend apps.

items.title: Cypress
items.description: Component and end-to-end browser testing framework. Where it fits, I like backing a project with a suite of meaningful tests covering the critical user flows.

items.title: Postman
items.description: An API development and testing client. Even though I keep eyeing alternatives, it's still my go-to for poking at APIs.

items.title: Lighthouse
items.description: Google's web quality auditing tool. I tend to spend quite a while in the Lighthouse panel, trying to improve the performance and accessibility of my web apps.

items.title: ESLint
items.description: A pluggable linter for JavaScript and TypeScript. While I've been experimenting with newer alternatives, I still rely on ESLint and its many plugins to keep code quality high in enterprise-scale applications.
